---
title: "Interactive teaching documents — tabsets & callouts"
description: "Layered teaching material: tabsets, collapsible answers, coloured callouts and cross-references — pure Markdown."
image: thumbnail.svg
image-alt: "Interactive teaching documents — tabsets & callouts — Blood Doctor · Quarto"
date: "2026-07-16"
categories: [Teaching, Interactive]
engine: markdown
---

A good teaching page reveals detail on demand. Quarto ships the building blocks as
simple Markdown fences — no JavaScript to write.

## Tabsets: one concept, several views

````markdown
::: {.panel-tabset}
## Film        …blood-film description…
## Immunophenotype  …markers…
## Management   …first-line therapy…
:::
````

Readers click between **Film**, **Immunophenotype** and **Management** without
leaving the page — ideal for comparing differentials.

## Callouts carry the signal

````markdown
::: {.callout-warning}
## Red flag
Blasts + coagulopathy → treat as APL until proven otherwise.
:::
````

Five callout styles (`note`, `tip`, `important`, `warning`, `caution`) give
teaching material a consistent visual grammar, and collapsible callouts hide a
model answer until the learner is ready.

::: {.callout-tip}
## See it live
The [**interactive teaching demo**](/outputs/interactive.qmd) combines tabsets,
callouts and a live Observable widget in one lesson page.
:::
